body.purpose: Summaries, details, notes, and input text.

label.purpose: Table headers, compact metadata, KPI labels, and filter group labels.

shadows.name: surface-shadow-dark
shadows.purpose: Default dark-theme card and filter-panel separation.

shadows.name: surface-shadow-light
shadows.purpose: Default light-theme card and filter-panel separation.

shadows.name: brand-mark-glow
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the small brand mark.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default hover and selection color transitions.

motion.name: card-hover
motion.purpose: Domain card border and tiny translate response on hover.

components.name: Status Action
components.description: Mutually exclusive review status action inside a domain card.
components.css: .ds-status-action { border: 1px solid var(--tf-border); border-radius: 6px; min-height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.42rem; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 850; } .ds-status-action-selected { background: var(--tf-accent); border-color: var(--tf-accent); color: var(--tf-button-active-text); }

components.name: Domain Review Card
components.description: The primary triage row combining domain identity, status, score, summary, country, comments, and details.
components.css: .ds-domain-card { background: var(--tf-surface); border: 1px solid var(--tf-card-border); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--tf-shadow); padding: 1rem; } .ds-domain-link { color: var(--tf-accent-2); font-weight: 800; }
